title: Ennis
description: Paper layering adaption of the textile blocks from Frank Lloyd Wright's Ennis House in Los Angeles, California.

media.alt: Paper layered Ennis House textile block with brick wall background.
media.caption: This project is an adaptation of the pattern of the textile blocks that make up the Ennis House at Los Angeles, California.

media.alt: Sun lit paper layering artwork that emphasizes the depth between the layers of paper.
media.caption: Each layer was constructed from single sheets of 8 x 11 inch card stock that I cut with an X-Acto knife.
